response.step_by_step_log: 1. Performer identified as VTuber Hakui Koyori. 2. Song performed is '管制塔より' (composed by Horie Shota), as evidenced by the on-screen credits and her post-performance discussion. 3. Video segmented into intro talk, song performance, announcement card, and post-performance talk. 4. Lyrics were transcribed from the on-screen subtitles for the song '管制塔より' as an official source could not be found via search tool.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Hakui Koyori performing her original song '管制塔より' (From the Control Tower), followed by a post-performance discussion about the song and its music video release.

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori greets the audience and introduces the live performance.
Hakui Koyori performs her original song '管制塔より' (composed by Horie Shota) on stage with virtual production.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ラジオネーム、不可解希望。育児はしなのだろうか
それともこの世界には僕は、お邪魔でしょうか
だとしても綴るよ
まっともなくなけぶよ
振られたって好きだよ、いいでしょ
いいでしょ
楽しかったよね、悔しかったよね
もうひとりごとは嫌だ
「待たせちゃったかな」
「別に待ってないよ」
夢と呼んだそれも僕たちだけ
もういいかい
答えよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
ここに居るのにな、意地悪だな
誰にも届かない光を
僕だけは光と呼び続ける
真夜中、管制塔から
あなたを明かしてやる

scenes.description: A brief text card announcing that the full music video will be available after the live stream concludes.
Hakui Koyori talks to the audience about the music video, its production, and the song release timing, and performs some idol poses.
